summary: Verified the three requested changes: (1) ThreeBackground now renders only particles (canvas present inside three-canvas-wrap, no console errors). (2) Team section fully removed (#team null, team-section testid null) and replaced by Pricing section with id='pricing' between Process and Contact. (3) Responsiveness verified at 375 / 768 / 1440 — no horizontal overflow at any width, pricing cards stack vertically on mobile, render 3-across with Growth elevated on desktop.
passed: Page loads cleanly with 0 console errors across desktop + mobile reloads
pricing-section + #pricing present, heading 'Plain numbers.' with 'numbers.' in text-acid
All 6 nav links present (work/services/studio/process/pricing/contact); nav-link-team removed
All 3 pricing cards present in order (starter, growth, premium) with matching CTA testids
Growth card is featured: contains pricing-featured-tag '◉ Most Popular', 2px acid border (rgb(211,255,36)), price in acid
Clicking nav-link-pricing smooth-scrolls pricing section into view
Desktop 1440: scrollWidth==innerWidth (1440), 3-column grid, Growth visually elevated (-translate-y-4 scale-1.02) per screenshot
Tablet 768: no horizontal overflow, desktop horizontal nav still visible (md breakpoint)
Mobile 375: scrollWidth==innerWidth (no overflow), pricing cards stack vertically (3 distinct tops, full width 327px), hero h1 fits within viewport (sw=cw=327)
